messages.content:
Which of the following elements is most likely to have an oxidation state of +2?
￼
A.
Strontium (Sr)
￼
B.
Oxygen (O)
￼
C.
Sodium (Na)
￼
D.
Chlorine (Cl)
A. Strontium (Sr) is most likely to have an oxidation state of +2.

What is used to determine the number of each atom in an ionic formula?
￼
A.
The electronegativity of each atom
￼
B.
The period of the metal in the formula
￼
C.
The oxidation state of each atom
￼
D.
The number of bonds in the formula
C. The oxidation state of each atom is used to determine the number of each atom in an ionic formula.

Which of the following is the correct formula for silicon dioxide?
￼
A.
SiO3
￼
B.
SiO2
￼
C.
SiO
￼
D.
Si2O
B. SiO2 is the correct formula for silicon dioxide.

Which of the following is the correct name for BaCl2?
￼
A.
Barium chlorine
￼
B.
Barium dichloride
￼
C.
Barium chloride
￼
D.
Monobarium dichloride
B. Barium dichloride is the correct name for BaCl2.

Which of the following is the correct name for BaCl2?
￼
A.
Barium chlorine
￼
B.
Barium dichloride
￼
C.
Barium chloride
￼
D.
Monobarium dichloride
B. Barium dichloride is the correct name for BaCl2.

How are oxidation states of transition metals indicated in the names of metal compounds?
￼
A.
Prefixes are used to indicate oxidation states.
￼
B.
Group numbers are used to indicate oxidation states.￼
C.
Subscripts are used to indicate oxidation states.
￼
D.
Roman numerals are used to indicate oxidation states.
D. Roman numerals are used to indicate oxidation states of transition metals in the names of metal compounds.

What determines the ratio of ions in an ionic compound?
￼
A.
The period the atoms are in
￼
B.
The electronegativity of each atom
￼
C.
The charges on the ions
￼
D.
The number of bonds formed
C. The charges on the ions determine the ratio of ions in an ionic compound.

Which of the following is used to indicate the number of each type of atom in the naming of a covalent molecule?
￼
A.
A suffix
￼
B.
A roman numeral
￼
C.
A subscript
￼
D.
A prefix
D. A prefix is used to indicate the number of each type of atom in the naming of a covalent molecule.

What is the correct prefix for 5?
￼
A.
Deca-
￼
B.
Penta-
￼
C.
Hexa-
￼
D.
Tetra-
B. Penta- is the correct prefix for 5.

Which of the following is the correct formula for aluminum oxide?
￼
A.
Al3O2
￼
B.
Al2O3
￼
C.
AlO
￼
D.
OAl
B. Al2O3 is the correct formula for aluminum oxide.
